$comment: Coverage thresholds for orchestrator agents and CI. Portable across projects — adjust values per-repo. NOTE: Thresholds set to 55% as first enforced baseline (measured 55.4% at initial enforcement). Generated files (*.g.dart, *.freezed.dart) are excluded. Roadmap: 55% (current) → 60% (next milestone) → 70% → 80% (target). Increase thresholds as more presentation-layer widget tests are added.

enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST check coverage against these thresholds before marking any task complete or creating a PR. If coverage drops below any threshold, the task fails.
